# VisLab Widgets

> Embeddable systems & CS education canvas simulations for technical writing (CPU, cache, OS, storage).

- Docs: https://mohitmishra786.github.io/vislab
- Source: https://github.com/mohitmishra786/vislab
- License: MIT
- Status: pre-1.0; install from monorepo until npm 0.1.0

## Primary pages

- / Quickstart and introduction
- /components/ Widget gallery
- /compare/ vs Mermaid / Excalidraw / video
- /guides/accessibility Accessibility for authors
- /guides/seo SEO patterns for canvas embeds

## Note

Canvas simulations are illustrations. Prefer surrounding prose for educational content and SEO.
